rulings.Case Title: JON DOE JR VS. CHARLES AKHIDNEOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injuction, And Memo
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 31, 2014, line 1. PETITIONER JON DOE Plaintiff's Motion For Preliminary Injuction Denied. Moving party failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits and failed to demonstrate irreparable harm if the injunction were denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. ADRIAN WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Renewed Application For Appointment Of Receiver; For Temporary Restraining Order; And Order To Show Cause Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 31, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC.'s Renewed Application For Appointment Of Receiver; For Temporary Restraining Order; And Order To Show Cause Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction GRANTED as requested, except paragraph 3a on page 2 of the Notice of Amended Motion is modified and the following language is stricken: "Exclude the defendants, or anyone claiming under or thorough them who does not have a valid lease or rental agreement for the possession of the Subject Property, or any portion thereof, from possession of the Subject Property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOUNIR KARDOSH VS. JOHN HAYES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Pltf To Tax Costs;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 31, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF MOUNIR KARDOSH's Motion By Plaintiff To Tax Costs Continued to February 5, 2014 per request of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. NINOSKA MONICO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 31, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR per moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK VS. RANDALL B. ALLISON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 31, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff shifted its burden by presenting evidence establishing prima facie evidence of compliance with CC 2924 and CCP 1161a. See Trustee's Deed Upon Sale. Defendant failed to provide admissible evidence to create triable issue of fact regarding compliance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALERIE LEE VS. MICHAEL W. SPENCER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons/First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 31, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPENCER's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons/First Amended Complaint DENIED, 5 days to respond. Complaint sufficiently alleges Plaintiff's standing (Paragraph 4) and lease under which defendant claims possession (Paragraph 6e). = (501/REQ)
